posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Add the ability to quickly mention & link to an item when writing in a rich text field as we are able to mention people. Where the link is the name of the item.

It is a very common occurrence where I want to reference another task in an update to make it easy for whoever is reading the update to go and find the item I am referencing. Currently I would have to go and get the link to the item and then go back to where I want to make the update to paste the link. I can’t change the text shown on the link, which is another thing for another day.
